message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts

1. "follow-up contract (after first quote in scenario): 15% policy-wide discount applies" expects 99
2. "each item in a follow-up quote still incurs the per-item first insurance surcharge" expects 192

Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Add an optional third parameter to quote: `context?: { previousQuoteCount?: number }`. If previousQuoteCount > 0, apply -15% follow-up discount on the policy total (after item modifiers, before fee).

Export the QuoteContext type so it can be imported elsewhere. Make sure existing tests still pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing tests and implement the minimal code needed to make them pass.

content.text:
All tests pass (22 passing, 33 todo).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added optional `QuoteContext` interface (exported) and third `context?: QuoteContext` parameter to `quote`. When `previousQuoteCount > 0`, multiplies total by 0.85 (after loyalty discount, before processing fee).
- Result: All tests now pass (22 passing, 33 todo).
- Approach: Minimal addition - a single conditional check applying the 15% follow-up discount on the policy total after item modifiers and loyalty discount but before the fee. No existing logic was modified.
